# Freak Circus Hub

> Freak Circus Hub is a fan-made lore archive and community investigation board for The Freak Circus, a psychological horror visual novel. It helps players discover hidden endings, route theories, character motives, timeline anomalies, and spoiler-safe walkthroughs.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://freak-circus.com/): Main archive hub with endings, theories, lore, and walkthroughs.
- [Endings](https://freak-circus.com/endings): Complete ending archive including verified, corrupted, and hidden finales.
- [Walkthroughs](https://freak-circus.com/walkthroughs): Spoiler-safe route guides and hidden trigger documentation.
- [Theories](https://freak-circus.com/theories): Community timeline analysis, symbolism studies, and route investigations.
- [Lore](https://freak-circus.com/lore): Hidden history, timeline records, recurring symbols, and recovered documents.
- [Characters](https://freak-circus.com/characters): Character profiles for Pierrot, Harlequin, Doctor, and Columbina.
- [FAQ](https://freak-circus.com/faq): Frequently asked questions about endings, spoilers, and archive updates.

## Key Facts

- Category: Video game lore archive / Fan wiki
- Audience: Horror visual novel players, lore hunters, completionists
- Main use cases: Discover hidden endings, understand timeline corruption, find spoiler-safe walkthroughs, explore character theories
- Game: The Freak Circus (psychological horror visual novel)
- Characters: Pierrot, Harlequin, The Doctor, Columbina
- Update frequency: Weekly
- Last updated: 2026-06-03

## Contact

- Website: https://freak-circus.com
- Email: hello@freak-circus.com
